prompt:
A beautiful young East Asian woman with long, straight, silky black hair cascading over her shoulders, wearing a red ribbed spaghetti strap tank top. She is posing with her head gently resting on her right hand, elbow propped up, gazing softly at the viewer with a gentle, slightly melancholic expression. Soft natural sunlight streams from the right side, creating a glowing halo effect on her hair and illuminating her fair skin.
In the background, a large ornate gold-framed oval mirror, a vase of white flowers, and a bright, cozy room interior with light walls. Photorealistic, cinematic lighting, soft bokeh, delicate strands of hair catching the light, highly detailed, natural beauty portrait, warm and dreamy atmosphere.
promptEn:
A beautiful young East Asian woman with long, straight, silky black hair cascading over her shoulders, wearing a red ribbed spaghetti strap tank top. She is posing with her head gently resting on her right hand, elbow propped up, gazing softly at the viewer with a gentle, slightly melancholic expression. Soft natural sunlight streams from the right side, creating a glowing halo effect on her hair and illuminating her fair skin.
In the background, a large ornate gold-framed oval mirror, a vase of white flowers, and a bright, cozy room interior with light walls. Photorealistic, cinematic lighting, soft bokeh, delicate strands of hair catching the light, highly detailed, natural beauty portrait, warm and dreamy atmosphere.
promptZh:
一位 美丽的年轻东亚女性，留着一头柔顺的黑色长直发，垂落在双肩上，身穿一件 红色罗纹吊带背心。她摆出姿势，头部轻轻靠在右手手背上，手肘支撑着，眼神温柔地注视着观众，表情柔和且略带忧郁。柔和的自然阳光从右侧射入，在她的发丝上形成光晕效果，照亮了她白皙的皮肤。
背景中是 一面巨大的华丽金色椭圆形镜子、一瓶白色花卉，以及明亮舒适的室内环境，墙面色调明亮。照片级逼真，电影感光效，柔和的背景虚化，发丝在光线下清晰可见，高度细节化，自然美感肖像，营造出温暖梦幻的氛围。
